action.reasoning: Observation: First iteration achieved 1.61% average accuracy (catastrophic forgetting). Only task 9 had non-zero accuracy (16.1%). Training time was ~127s for 20 epochs total (2 per task). Analysis: Naive sequential training without any continual learning strategy completely forgets previous tasks. With 29 iterations and ~5 hours remaining, I need to implement a replay-based strategy. Decision: Implement experience replay with a class-balanced memory buffer (20 exemplars per class = 2000 total), use pretrained ResNet-18 weights, train 5 epochs per task. This is a strong baseline that should dramatically reduce forgetting.
